knownGaps.details: No screenshots or pixel diffs were produced for T13 because this task has no rendering surface; T14 owns visual one-to-one comparison.
T13 proves route-state and API/DB security behavior for O10/O11; T15 owns full parent owner click journey evidence.
A broad all-file server run and one report selector run showed intermittent temp DB/payment/report failures outside the T13 focused gate. The required T13 gate passed after implementation.
